title: Simulating Percolation in Python: How Do Wildfires & Diseases Spread?
summary: This video tutorial demonstrates how to implement percolation simulations in Python to model the spread of wildfires and diseases. Percolation theory is used to understand how phenomena propagate through networks and systems.
writeup: This NeuralNine tutorial implements percolation simulations in Python to model how wildfires and diseases spread. It applies percolation theory, which describes how phenomena propagate through networks and systems. The video covers building the simulation in code and connecting the concept of percolation to real spreading dynamics.
